case_title: K AND L TRADING INC. VS. JOSUE DE LEON LARA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VICTOR LIU. DEFENDANT JOSUE DE LEON LARA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY K AND L TRADING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-24-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K AND L TRADING INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,670.42 AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON LARA, JOSUE
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY K AND L TRADING INC.
